title: I-Day: Indian Olympic contingent, BRO workers, Lakhpati Didi beneficiaries among 6,000 guests
description: The theme of this year's Independence Day is 'Viksit Bharat @ 2047'. The gathering comprised people from different walks of life, categorised as youth, tribal community, farmers, women and other special guests, who have excelled in various fields with the help of various government schemes/initiatives.
keywords: india news,delhi,red fort,narendra modi,rahul gandhi,ncc cadets,guests,Viksit Bharat @ 2047
